capabilities.label: Admin UI SDK extension

provisioning.label: Admin UI SDK
provisioning.help: Install the Adobe Commerce Admin UI SDK module in the Commerce instance. https://developer.adobe.com/commerce/extensibility/admin-ui-sdk/

files.content: ${menuName}

capabilities.postNote: Admin UI SDK renders this App Builder UI inside the Commerce admin. Declare required ACL resources (commerce-saas/admin-ext-permissions). Run `aio app dev` to preview.

capabilities.label: I/O Events consumer (Commerce events)

provisioning.label: Adobe I/O Events for Commerce
provisioning.help: Install the Adobe I/O Events module + register the Commerce event provider. https://developer.adobe.com/commerce/extensibility/events/

capabilities.postNote: Register the action as an event consumer in app.config.yaml and subscribe to ${eventCode}. I/O Event deliveries can REPEAT — make the handler idempotent (use event.id) (commerce-saas/idempotent-event-handlers).

capabilities.label: Payment Services webhook handler

provisioning.label: Payment Services
provisioning.help: Onboard Payment Services + a merchant account. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/payment-services

capabilities.postNote: Expose as a web action (web: true). VERIFY the provider signature before processing (commerce-saas/payment-webhook-verify); keep the signing secret in .env, never inline.
